description_long: This chaise features a sleek, modern design with a rectangular black upholstered seat and a matching upright backrest at one end. The upholstery appears smooth and solid, with no visible patterns or tufting, giving it a minimalist and contemporary look. The frame and legs are constructed from light-colored wood, providing a warm contrast to the dark seat and backrest. The legs are straight and cylindrical, supporting the chaise at each corner for stability. The backrest is simple and unadorned, rising to a moderate height and seamlessly integrated with the seat. This piece would be well-suited for urban parks, public lounges, or modern outdoor seating areas.
description: A modern black upholstered chaise with a wooden frame and straight cylindrical legs, featuring a simple upright backrest. The design is minimalist and contemporary, ideal for urban environments.
description_view_0: Front view shows the full width of the black seat and the upright backrest, with the wooden legs visible at the corners.
description_view_1: Side view highlights the chaise's length, the thickness of the seat cushion, and the height of the backrest at one end.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the back of the backrest and the wooden support structure, with both rear legs clearly visible.
description_view_3: Opposite side view mirrors view 1, showing the chaise's length and the backrest's position at the far end.
attribute_backrest_design: The backrest is a simple, rectangular, and upright panel upholstered in black material, with no visible segmentation, tufting, or decorative elements. It rises to a moderate height and is seamlessly integrated with the seat.
attribute_armrest_presence: No armrests are present on either side of the chaise.
attribute_leg_style: The legs are straight, cylindrical, and made of light-colored wood, positioned at each corner for stability. They have a smooth finish and lack any decorative elements.
attribute_upholstery_pattern: The upholstery is solid black with a smooth, untextured surface and no visible patterns, tufting, or quilting.
attribute_cushion_arrangement: There is a single, large, attached seat cushion and an integrated upright backrest cushion, both of similar thickness and covered in the same black material. No loose or additional cushions are visible.
